info.title: dotnet-ensure-unique
info.description: A dotnet global tool that ensures an application is executed only once at the same time.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Execute a program and ensure there are no concurrent executions

options.name: BucketName
options.description: Specify the AWS S3 bucket to use to check the lock

options.name: FilePrefix
options.description: Specify the file prefix to be used when creating a file on AWS S3

options.name: Token
options.description: Specify the token to be used to ensure uniqueness

options.name: ProgramArguments
options.description: Specify arguments to be passed to the program

arguments.name: PathToProgram
arguments.description: Path to the program to execute using 'dotnet'
